nasb.text: “If there is among you any man who is unclean because of a nocturnal emission, then he must go outside the camp; he may not reenter the camp.

esv.text: “If any man among you becomes unclean because of a nocturnal emission, then he shall go outside the camp. He shall not come inside the camp,

cnv.text: “如果你們中間有人因為夜間偶然夢遺而不潔淨，就要出到營外去，不可進入營中。

ccb.text: 如果有人因梦遗而不洁净，他就要离开营地住在营外。
